source_paper: Lopez-Villanueva et al. 2022 history-dependent initialization study
message: Current RI-MML solver supports only a pointwise initial condition u(0)=u0. It does not implement history-dependent initialization, so Lopez is included only to document a boundary of applicability.
not_supported: one-to-one replay of Lopez decay curves with the present solver
supported_surrogate_only: analytic decay families g1/g2/g3 as external references
